Sections.BasicsSubtitle: Name, pitch, and a link people can click.

Publish.OneLinePitchHint: {count}/90 · tell us what it does in a tweet

Publish.LongerPitchHint: What inspired it, what it does, what makes it different. Markdown ok.
Publish.TagsHint: Press Enter to add. Use stack names, not buzzwords.
Publish.TipsTitle: Tips for getting on the front page

Tips.Pitch: Ship a one-line pitch that makes someone laugh or curious.
Tips.Screenshots: Real screenshots beat slick covers — show the actual thing.
Tips.Reply: Reply to early comments. Builders remember.

Profile.AvatarHelp: PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF · up to 2 MB
Profile.BannerGradientHelp: Pick one of the presets to set your profile banner.

NotificationsForm.Subtitle: Choose what fires a browser notification when Hatch isn't in front of you.
NotificationsForm.EnableMasterSub: Required for any push to reach you off-site.
NotificationsForm.ContactRequestsSub: When someone wants to reach out about your app
NotificationsForm.MessagesSub: New messages in an active conversation
NotificationsForm.CommentsSub: When someone comments on your app

ApiKeysPage.Title: API Keys
ApiKeysPage.Subtitle: Generate a personal access token to connect any MCP client (ChatGPT, Cursor, Continue, custom agents, etc.) to your Hatch account. One active key per user — revoke and regenerate to rotate.
ApiKeysPage.NoActiveKeyHint: Click below to generate one. You'll see the token only once.
ApiKeysPage.ConfigSubtitle: Paste this into your MCP client config. Replace <paste-your-token> with the token you saved when generating the key.
ApiKeysPage.SaveTokenNotice: Save this now — you won't see it again.
ApiKeysPage.TokenLossWarning: After closing, the token is gone for good. Revoke and regenerate if you lose it.

Notifications.Title: Notifications
Notifications.PanelFooter: Only people you accept can email you. Decline keeps your inbox tidy.

Messages.Title: Messages
Messages.EmptyConversations: You haven't started any conversations yet — accept a contact request to begin.
Messages.EmptyThreadHint: Choose a chat on the left, or accept a contact request to start a new one.
Messages.FailedToSend: Failed to send message. Please try again.

Contact.Title: Contact {name}
Contact.MessagePlaceholder: Hi {name}, I lead pre-seed at Slope Partners. Loved {app} — would love 25 mins to learn how you're thinking about it…
Contact.HeadsUpTitle: Heads up — this shares your contact info.
Contact.HeadsUpBody: If {name} accepts, they'll see your name, handle, email ({email}@hatch.dev), profile, and the link above. They can reply directly. You can revoke access anytime.
Contact.ConsentLabel: I'm sharing my contact details with {name} for the purpose of this {role} inquiry.
Contact.RepliesWithin: {name} typically replies within 1–2 days. We'll notify you when they accept or decline.
Contact.DefaultMessage: Hi {name}, I'd love to chat about {app}.

Hero.Headline: Where builders <grad>ship</grad>, get <grad>discovered</grad>, and <grad>connect</grad>.
Hero.Subhead: Publish your side-project in 60 seconds. Let investors, collaborators, and AI agents find you — no polished decks, no cold DMs.

Bento.Title: Everything a side-project needs to be seen
Bento.Subtitle: A complete toolkit for shipping, surfacing, and connecting — built for the way builders actually work.

Publish.Title: Ship it in 60 seconds
Publish.Body: Name it, describe it, pick a vibe — you're live. No polished decks, no asset wrangling, no design pressure.

Art.Title: 3 generative covers, custom uploads
Art.Body: Every project gets a unique generative cover. Re-roll until it sings.

Contact.Title: Consent-based outreach
Contact.Body: Investors and collaborators reach out with clear intent — never a cold DM.

Card.Title: Reach out to alex.k
Card.InputText: Loved the demo. Pre-seed check, no pressure to reply…

Notifs.Title: Real-time signal
Notifs.Body: Know instantly when someone likes, comments, or wants to talk.

Ranking.Title: The best work surfaces
Ranking.Body: Community-driven hot ranking — no hunters, no gatekeepers.

HowItWorks.Title: Four steps from idea to inbox
HowItWorks.Subhead: A path so short you'll spend more time building than launching.

SignIn.Title: Sign in
SignIn.Description: GitHub or Google — no waitlist, no email verification roundtrips.

Publish.Title: Publish
Publish.Description: Fill three fields, pick a vibe. We generate the cover art for you.

GetDiscovered.Title: Get discovered
GetDiscovered.Description: Hot ranking, search, and categories surface your project to the right people.

Connect.Title: Connect
Connect.Description: Contact requests, then real messaging — Slack-style threads built in.

ForInvestors.Title:
Organic deal-flow,

without the cold-DM cringe.
ForInvestors.Subhead: See what people are actually building today. Reach out with role and intent attached. Builders see exactly why you're knocking.

Signal.Title: Earliest possible signal
Signal.Description: Hot ranking surfaces projects with traction in hours, not weeks.

Contact.Title: Respectful contact
Contact.Description: Builders accept or decline. No spam, no ghost-inboxes.

Intent.Title: Clear intent labels
Intent.Description: Invest · Collab · Hire — your role is visible before the first message.

Preview.OutboundMessage: Loved the demo. Pre-seed check, no pressure to reply. 30 min next week?
Preview.ReplyMessage: Yes — Thursday 3pm? I'll send a Cal link 🚀

Agents.Title: AI-native from day one
Agents.Subhead: Your project is agent-discoverable. Your favorite LLM and custom agents can browse, search, and even publish — all through the same primitives you use.
Agents.StackTitle:
15 MCP tools.

One REST API.

Zero glue code.
Agents.StackDescription: Drop Hatch into your favorite MCP client in 30 seconds. Build custom agents against a clean REST surface. Read llms.txt for context, ship.

Terminal.CommentDiscover: # Discover what's hot in audio tools today

GalleryPreview.Subtitle: A peek at the live feed. Browse by hot, new, or all-time.
GalleryPreview.Empty: No apps yet — be the first to publish.

Testimonials.Title: From builders & backers
Testimonials.Subhead: Early users from both sides of the table.

One.Quote: I'd been sitting on a side-project for 8 months waiting for it to be 'ready.' Published it on Hatch in 40 minutes. Three angels reached out the same week.
One.Name: Alex K.

Two.Quote: It's the first builder community where I can actually find pre-seed deal-flow without spamming Twitter DMs. Hatch's intent labels saved my entire workflow.
Two.Name: J. Lee

Three.Quote: Wiring my agent into Hatch took 30 seconds. It now publishes my changelog entries, replies to comments, and routes contact requests. Real magic.
Three.Name: M. Chen

FinalCta.Title:
Your project

deserves to be seen.
FinalCta.Subtitle: Sixty seconds from idea to live page. Free forever for builders.
